query:
DELETE w1 FROM wardrobeItems w1
INNER JOIN wardrobeItems w2
WHERE w1.userId = w2.userId
  AND w1.itemType = w2.itemType
  AND w1.name = w2.name
  AND w1.id > w2.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RfxnZb4sKQE9yA3.root --database SGdPHKr3xPrRPbHA9C9esB --execute DELETE w1 FROM wardrobeItems w1
INNER JOIN wardrobeItems w2
WHERE w1.userId = w2.userId
  AND w1.itemType = w2.itemType
  AND w1.name = w2.name
  AND w1.id > w2.id;
